text:
First, note that time zones as we know them didn’t exist in 1573, but for the sake of the problem, we assume modern time zone rules applied historically.  

Europe/Athens is UTC+2 (EET) in standard time (no DST in July).  
Asia/Singapore is UTC+8.  

Time difference: UTC+8 − UTC+2 = +6 hours.  

12:00 in Athens → 18:00 (same day) in Singapore.  

Date remains July 26, 1573.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 18:00
